=== Bold FAQ Plugin ===
Tags: utility
Requires at least: 6.0
Tested up to: 6.5
Stable tag: 1.0.0
License: MIT

Tests FAQ parsing with bold-style headings.

== Description ==

A plugin with bold-style FAQ headings.

== Frequently Asked Questions ==

**Does this use bold headings?**

Yes, questions are wrapped in double asterisks instead of = signs.

**What about multiple questions?**

Each bold line is treated as a new FAQ entry.
